features.name: memory with zero address bits and width-mismatched write enable
features.description: Code should include a memory/array declaration with ABITS=0 (single entry) and WIDTH=3, where the write enable signal has width 3 instead of width 1, causing a port width mismatch that triggers an assertion failure in the SMT2 backend

features.name: empty address port on memory with non-zero width data
features.description: Code should include a memory cell where the address port is an empty connection { } (width 0) but the data port has non-zero width, creating an inconsistent memory cell definition that triggers assertion failure when processed by the SMT2 backend
